pi_items.source: Explicitly defined in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh.
Task description and verifier.py strictly enforce a 14 day timespan.
Task description and verifier.py strictly enforce a 60 second step size.
Task description and verifier.py strictly enforce an interpolation order of 7.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating a GMAT script at '/home/ga/Documents/missions/magsat2_ephemeris.script' and outputting two ephemeris files (OEM and SPK) to '/home/ga/GMAT_output/magsat2_predicts.oem' and '/home/ga/GMAT_output/magsat2_predicts.bsp'. The target duration is exactly 14 days with a 60-second step size, and an OEM interpolation order of 7. All parameters and initial conditions are synthetically generated dynamically via setup scripts.
